sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n86565" key="proanatre/xw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προανα-τρέχω</orth>, <sense id="n86565.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">run up in front,</tr_> prob. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">προσ-</foreign> in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:2:64" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.64</biblScope> </bibl> and <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:6:74" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.74</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
